reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención, la comida, la bebida, el precio, (por tres empanadas ya podés elegir una bebida, eso es un combo), las empanadas riquísimas, un amor de persona la chica que nos atendió, se llama Nadia

(Translated by Google)
The service, food, drinks, and price were all excellent (you can choose a drink with three empanadas, that's a combo deal). The empanadas were delicious, and the girl who served us, Nadia, was a lovely person.

reviewReply.comment:

Buena semana!!

reviews.comment:
Mi calificación a la YPF ACA -CARHUE ,es por la atención que tuvo la empleada conmigo me atendió de 10 ,super simpática , pedí dos cafés cortados con alfajores ,servicio muy bueno ,lugar limpio y prolijo . Y doy 5 estrellas ma allá de la atención e!!! El baño estaba impecable y perfumado  ,para todos los quieran hacer una parada en esta estación de Servicio se los recomiendo .👌

(Translated by Google)
My rating for the YPF ACA - CARHUE is based on the excellent service I received from the employee. She was incredibly friendly and helpful. I ordered two cortado coffees with alfajores. The service was very good, and the place was clean and tidy. I'm giving it 5 stars not only for the service but also because the bathroom was spotless and smelled wonderful. I highly recommend this service station to anyone who wants to stop. 👌
